module.name: src
module.purpose: Rust workspace source root for Marix crates with a flat Cargo crate layout plus prompt-template sources. It organizes agent, client, common, prompt, host, protocol, and tool crates/modules; the agent gained an execution-tracking module and routes step and plan events through Step, protocol plan/session events now carry PlanEvent and task-keyed signatures, and the host renamed its per-request ExecutionContext to ExecutionState.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt/step/plan/execution orchestration; a new execution module tracks tool executions keyed by ExecutionSignature, and Step owns step/plan routing shared by the task runtime.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client crate namespace for the marix_client library, ClientSession and signature-aware ClientEvent source, and client binaries including a CLI whose oneshot mode exits on Done completion events; ClientSession creates task signatures with empty names and leaves request text in TaskEvent::Create.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared common crate namespace for config loading with serializable System/Platform/Arch re-exports, external adapters, logging, and structure utilities including WorkQueue::clear for session cleanup.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Owns prompt templates used by model-facing steps, including no-Model Step kind formats, run_steps Plan output examples, answer-only Initial JSON for no-step requests, and Intent text in the surrounding step description.

childModules.name: protocol
childModules.purpose: First-class marix-protocol workspace crate for reusable session, task, answer, plan, step, execution, tool, and shared Signature definitions; TaskSignature derives ordering/hashing to key execution and plan maps, PlanEvent and task-carrying PlanSignature join the plan contracts, and SessionEvent carries plan events.

childModules.name: host
childModules.purpose: Host crate namespace for HostSession and host-side tool execution; executor preview replies send System::new host metadata and tool previews, unknown-tool failures send ExecutionStatus failure events, and the per-request ExecutionContext was renamed to ExecutionState.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Top-level marix-tool crate that defines ToolProgram and native tool executables; it now depends on marix-protocol for tool preview/schema protocol types.
